page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, backed by 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB per core. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and includes 35 MB of L3 cache. It does not feature local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates a clear divergence between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics, such as stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores, fall into the bottom 25%, with single-threaded gzip compression rated in the bottom 10%. However, the 32 dedicated physical cores compensate in multi-threaded workloads, achieving average tier results in Geekbench multi-core, PassMark CPU, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Memory bandwidth also performs in the middle 50% tier, with uncached read speeds reaching 98.48 GB/sec and write speeds at 49.01 GB/sec.

Given its hardware profile, this instance is qualitatively cost-effective for legacy multi-threaded workloads that do not require high single-core clock speeds or advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 VNNI. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, medium-scale database operations, static web serving, and basic multi-threaded compilation tasks. The lack of local storage and GPU acceleration makes it less suitable for high-performance storage-bound databases or intensive deep learning tasks, but its balanced vCPU-to-RAM ratio provides a stable environment for standard enterprise workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor at 2.5 GHz, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 instance provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, utilizing a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show weak single-core capabilities, but the 32 dedicated cores deliver average-tier multi-core performance in PassMark, Geekbench, and multi-threaded decompression tests. Memory bandwidth and database operations also perform in the middle tier. This instance is best suited for multi-threaded enterprise workloads, static web serving, and general-purpose applications that benefit from dedicated physical cores but do not require high single-threaded performance or local NVMe storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 cores, 128 GB RAM, and 6 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average multi-core performance for enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core general-purpose instance delivering balanced memory and multi-threaded processing for standard enterprise workloads.

128.0 GB of system memory with a balanced 1:4 ratio
6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Average multi-core and memory bandwidth benchmark performance
Suitable for static web serving, databases, and multi-threaded applications
